name: ADDGENE_API_KEY
purpose: Look up plasmids and deposited constructs from the Addgene repository.
without: Addgene tools are blocked without it.

name: AZURE_OPENAI_API_KEY
purpose: Use Azure-hosted OpenAI models for embeddings (enterprise alternative to OpenAI).
without: Optional alternative to OpenAI — leave blank if you don't use Azure.

name: BIOGRID_ACCESS_KEY
purpose: Retrieve protein–protein and genetic interaction networks.
without: BioGRID tools are blocked without it. The key is free.

name: BOLTZ_MCP_SERVER_HOST
purpose: URL of a self-hosted Boltz structure-prediction MCP server.
without: Leave blank unless you run your own Boltz server.

name: BRENDA_EMAIL
purpose: BRENDA account email — retrieves enzyme kinetics, substrates, and parameters.
without: BRENDA tools are blocked without an account (paired with the password).

name: BRENDA_PASSWORD
purpose: BRENDA account password — authenticates the enzyme-data SOAP API.
without: Required together with the BRENDA email.

name: CELLXGENE_CENSUS_PACKAGE_INSTALLED
purpose: Synthetic gate. Set to '1' after `pip install cellxgene-census`; CELLxGENE tools require the Python package, not a network key.
without: All 7 CELLxGENE tools skip in the test harness and return a clear 'package not installed' error at runtime.

name: CENSUS_API_KEY
purpose: Pull population, demographic, and economic data from the US Census Bureau (decennial + ACS).
without: Census endpoints return an HTML rate-limit page that breaks the tool's JSON parser. Free to register.

name: CLUE_API_KEY
purpose: Query Connectivity Map drug–gene perturbation signatures for repurposing.
without: CLUE tools are blocked without it. The key is free.

name: DISGENET_API_KEY
purpose: Pull curated gene–disease association scores and supporting evidence.
without: Limited public data works without it; the key unlocks full access.

name: ESM_API_KEY
purpose: Run EvolutionaryScale ESM protein language models (embeddings, structure prediction).
without: ESM Forge tools are blocked without it.

name: ESM_MCP_SERVER_HOST
purpose: URL of a self-hosted ESM MCP server.
without: Leave blank unless you run your own ESM server.

name: EXPERT_FEEDBACK_MCP_SERVER_URL
purpose: URL of a self-hosted expert-feedback MCP service.
without: Leave blank unless you run this service.

name: FDA_API_KEY
purpose: Query FDA drug labels, adverse-event reports (FAERS), and recalls.
without: Works at 240 requests/min without it; the key raises it to 120,000/day.

name: FDC_API_KEY
purpose: Look up food and nutrient composition from USDA FoodData Central.
without: Falls back to a shared, rate-limited DEMO_KEY without it.

name: GEMINI_API_KEY
purpose: Use Google Gemini models for LLM-backed (agentic) tools.
without: Only needed if you select Gemini as the agentic LLM provider.

name: HF_TOKEN
purpose: Download Hugging Face models and datasets used by structure/sequence tools.
without: Public models work without it; needed for gated or private repos.

name: ICD_CLIENT_ID
purpose: WHO ICD-11 API client ID (OAuth) for disease classification lookups.
without: ICD-11 tools are blocked without it (paired with the client secret).

name: ICD_CLIENT_SECRET
purpose: WHO ICD-11 API client secret (OAuth), used with the client ID.
without: Required together with ICD_CLIENT_ID.

name: MCULE_API_KEY
purpose: Check purchasability and pricing of chemical compounds.
without: Compound search works without it; the key unlocks ordering and availability.

name: NCBI_API_KEY
purpose: Search PubMed and fetch citation metrics (iCite) and PubTator annotations.
without: Works at 3 requests/sec without it; the key raises the limit to 10/sec.

name: NVIDIA_API_KEY
purpose: Call NVIDIA NIM model endpoints (hosted inference for bio/chem models).
without: NIM tools are blocked without it.

name: OMIM_API_KEY
purpose: Look up Mendelian disease–gene relationships and clinical variant records for interpretation.
without: OMIM tools return no data without it. Free for academic use.

name: ONCOKB_API_TOKEN
purpose: Annotate cancer variants with oncogenicity and matched therapy implications.
without: Runs in demo mode (BRAF, TP53, ROS1 only) without a token.

name: OPENAI_API_KEY
purpose: Generate text embeddings for the semantic tool finder.
without: The tool finder falls back to local embeddings without it.

name: OPENROUTER_API_KEY
purpose: Use OpenRouter-hosted models for LLM-backed (agentic) tools.
without: Only needed if you select OpenRouter as the agentic LLM provider.

name: PHARMVAR_API_KEY
purpose: Resolve pharmacogene star-allele definitions (e.g. CYP2D6, CYP2C19).
without: PharmVar tools are blocked without it.

name: SEMANTIC_SCHOLAR_API_KEY
purpose: Search papers and traverse citation graphs via Semantic Scholar.
without: Works at ~1 request/sec without it; the key raises rate limits.

name: TXAGENT_MCP_SERVER_HOST
purpose: URL of a self-hosted TxAgent MCP server.
without: Leave blank unless you run your own TxAgent.

name: UMLS_API_KEY
purpose: Authenticate to UMLS for concept, SNOMED CT, and LOINC lookups.
without: UMLS/SNOMED/LOINC tools are blocked without it (free UMLS license).

name: USPTO_API_KEY
purpose: Search US patents and patent-application full text.
without: USPTO patent tools are blocked without it.

name: USPTO_MCP_SERVER_HOST
purpose: URL of a self-hosted USPTO MCP server.
without: Leave blank unless you run your own USPTO server.
